name: Ritual Beast Ambush
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 of your "Ritual Beast Tamer" monsters and 1 of your "Spiritual Beast" monsters that are banished and/or in your GY; Special Summon them in Defense Position. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except "Ritual Beast" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ritual Beast Ambush" per turn.
eff: Target 1 of your "Ritual Beast Tamer" monsters and 1 of your "Spiritual Beast" monsters that are banished and/or in your GY; Special Summon them in Defense Position. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon, except "Ritual Beast" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ritual Beast Ambush" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
